conservative.name: Law of Form
conservative.requirements:
4 power
Target object no larger than you within close range

success.description: You reach out with your magic and improve the form of the target item. It becomes stronger than steel and it's durability improves. Attempts to break the item suffer . The spell's effects last until the end of the episode
As above, and the item becomes a superior example of its type

boon.description: A numerical trait of the item, such as soak value or Pierce rating, improves by 1 until the end of the episode. You may trigger this effect multiple times. Each time it affects a new trait

sigmarsComet.description: The item becomes truly unbreakable until the end of the act

success.description: You reach out with your magic and improve the form of the target item. It becomes stronger than steel and it's durability improves. Attempts to break the item suffer . The spell's effects last until the end of the episode
As above, and the item becomes a superior example of its type

boon.description: A numerical trait of the item, such as soak value or Pierce rating, improves by 1 until the end of the episode. You may trigger this effect multiple times. Each time it affects a new trait

chaosStar.description: The item becomes unbreakable, unbendable, and much heavier, increasing its Encumbrance value by 2 for each
